ApiHub.metaTitle: API for Swiss drug shortages | engpassradar.ch
ApiHub.metaDescription: REST API for Swiss drug shortages — with severity scoring, ATC filtering and daily updates. For hospitals, pharmacies and software vendors.
ApiHub.h1: Drug shortage data straight into your system.
ApiHub.subtitle: Daily-updated shortages, BWL warnings and severity scores via a simple REST API. For hospitals, pharmacy chains and pharmaceutical software vendors.
ApiHub.valueProp1Body: Daily scrape from drugshortage.ch and BWL — always the current state, not yesterday's.
ApiHub.valueProp2Body: Each product receives a combined score from duration, alternatives, BWL status and criticality.
ApiHub.valueProp3Body: GTIN, Pharmacode, ATC groups and Swissmedic data — no mapping, no gaps.
ApiHub.mcpTitle: MCP server for Claude, Copilot & Cursor
ApiHub.mcpBody: Engpassradar data as native agent tools — directly in your AI workflow, no scraping. Tools:
ApiHub.faq1Q: Do I need an API key for first tests?
ApiHub.faq1A: No. All public endpoints are accessible without a key — up to 100 requests per hour per IP. For production use we recommend a Professional key.
ApiHub.faq2Q: How quickly will I be activated?
ApiHub.faq2A: After successful payment via Stripe you will receive your API key by email immediately. The magic link takes you straight to your dashboard — no password needed.
ApiHub.faq3Q: Is there a research plan for academia?
ApiHub.faq3A: Yes — for universities, universities of applied sciences and Swiss hospitals we issue free research keys with 2,000 req/day. Just apply with your institutional email.
ApiHub.faq4Q: What is included in the Severity Score?
ApiHub.faq4A: The score combines four factors: transparency of the report (0–5 pts), shortage duration (0–25 pts), missing alternatives (0–25 pts) and mandatory stock / BWL status (0–25 pts). Maximum: 80 points.
ApiHub.faq5Q: Can I redistribute the data in my software?
ApiHub.faq5A: Redistribution requires a Data License agreement. Write to us at api@engpassradar.ch.

ApiDocs.metaDescription: Public REST API for Swiss drug shortages. No API key. JSON, CSV and timeline data freely available.
ApiDocs.intro: Free access to all Swiss drug shortages. No API key, no login required. Please use fairly — max. ~300 requests/day recommended.
ApiDocs.upgradeBoxBody: Professional keys from CHF 39/month — with severity scoring and 10,000 req/day.
ApiDocs.baseUrlNote: All responses are UTF-8 JSON. CORS is enabled ({header}).
ApiDocs.endpointAlternativesBatch: Batch alternatives for up to 50 GTINs
ApiDocs.shortagesIntro: Returns a paginated, filterable list of all reported shortages.
ApiDocs.paramSearchDesc: Full-text search on label, company, ATC code
ApiDocs.shortageDetailIntro: Full details for a single product including
ApiDocs.paramGtinDesc: GTIN of the product (7–14 digits), in URL path
ApiDocs.statsIntro: Aggregated metrics on the current supply situation. Useful for dashboards and monitoring.
ApiDocs.timelineIntro: Weekly time series: new shortages and active stock. Ideal for trend analyses.
ApiDocs.alternativesIntro: Active-substance-equivalent alternatives for a product, split into same company, co-marketing and all alternatives. Responses are cached for 24 hours.
ApiDocs.alternativesBatchIntro: Alternatives lookup for up to 50 GTINs in a single request. Significantly more efficient than N individual calls.
ApiDocs.alternativesBatchNote: {code} when no cached alternatives exist for a GTIN yet.
ApiDocs.csvIntro: Returns all (filtered) shortages as a CSV file. Directly importable into Excel or Python pandas.
ApiDocs.csvFields: Fields: label, company, ATC code, status, available from, last mutation, days since report, GTIN, Pharmacode, first seen
ApiDocs.healthIntro: System health check. Returns {ok} when all systems are ready, {fail} on issues.
ApiDocs.rateLimitsIntro: The API is free for research and small teams. For commercial integrations, please choose a plan that supports operations.
ApiDocs.status429: Rate limit exceeded — X-RateLimit-Reset contains the reset timestamp
ApiDocs.webhooksIntro: Webhooks send an HTTP POST request to your URL as soon as a new shortage is reported or an existing one is resolved — no polling, in real time.
ApiDocs.webhookCreatedDesc: New shortage on the Swissmedic list
ApiDocs.webhookUpgradeTitle: Webhooks are available in the Klinik-System
ApiDocs.webhookUpgradeBody: Engpassradar Pro receives data via API polling. The Klinik-System (CHF 199/mo) sends push events directly to your infrastructure.
ApiDocs.mcpIntroPart1: The MCP server provides engpassradar data as native agent tools — no scraping, directly in the workflow of Claude Desktop, GitHub Copilot or Cursor. Questions like
ApiDocs.mcpIntroExample: "Inhibace is unavailable — what alternatives exist for C09AA?"
ApiDocs.mcpToolSearchShortagesDesc: Full-text search by product, active substance or company
ApiDocs.mcpToolGetShortageDesc: Single product by GTIN — incl. score, price, BWL status
ApiDocs.mcpToolFindAlternativesDesc: Alternatives for a product in shortage — with their own shortage status
ApiDocs.mcpToolCheckAtcGroupDesc: How many products in an ATC class are affected? (C09, C09AA, …)
ApiDocs.mcpToolListActiveShortagesDesc: Bulk list of active shortages with filters
ApiDocs.mcpToolGetCompanyStatusDesc: Company profile: active shortages + transparency score
ApiDocs.mcpToolGetWeeklySummaryDesc: KPI snapshot: total active, critical, BWL-affected
ApiDocs.mcpSmitheryBody: No download, no build. The server runs hosted at {server} — Smithery connects your AI client directly to it.
ApiDocs.mcpManualBody: For direct HTTP connection without Smithery — add to {file} (macOS: {path}):

KlinikSystem.metaDescription: Shortage monitoring for Swiss hospital pharmacies: score, alerting, API — integrated into your workflow. Request a free Shortage Report for your institution.
KlinikSystem.heroH1: Know first thing tomorrow what landed on the list overnight — before your first phone call.
KlinikSystem.heroSubtitle: Engpassradar Klinik-System integrates daily-updated shortage data with score, alerting and API into your pharmacy workflow — without your own infrastructure, without manual aggregation.
KlinikSystem.heroCtaNote: No subscription. No pitch. We create a personalised report for your institution — within 24 h.
KlinikSystem.pain1Title: By the time a shortage becomes visible, time has often passed
KlinikSystem.pain1Body: Anyone checking manually each day only sees changes at the next check. Acting proactively requires proactive information.
KlinikSystem.pain2Title: Not every shortage is equally critical
KlinikSystem.pain2Body: Without a rating, everything looks equally urgent. Which shortage actually affects your range? How long does it typically last? Are there alternatives?
KlinikSystem.pain3Title: Integration costs more than a subscription
KlinikSystem.pain3Body: Building your own scraper, your own database and your own alerts ties up engineering time. Engpassradar delivers all of that as a finished API.
KlinikSystem.includesH2: What you have from day one.
KlinikSystem.includesSubtitle: Configured in a 30-minute onboarding call. No internal IT project.
KlinikSystem.include1: Shortage score 0–100 for each active report (proprietary metric)
KlinikSystem.include2: Webhook alerts for new shortages in your ATC classes
KlinikSystem.include4: Monthly Shortage Report Switzerland as PDF — exclusive
KlinikSystem.include5: 30-min onboarding call: set up the watchlist together
KlinikSystem.comparisonBody: 3 staff · 15 min/day · CHF 90/h = CHF 297/month staff cost for manual monitoring. The Klinik-System costs CHF 199.
KlinikSystem.purchaseBody: not the software — the daily-reliable infrastructure, without you having to operate scrapers, databases or alerts yourself.
KlinikSystem.formSubtitle: We create a personalised report for your institution and reply personally — no autoresponder.
KlinikSystem.stat2Label: Automatic ODDB enrichment (ATC, GTIN, active substance)
KlinikSystem.stat3Label: Avg. time until a new report is visible in the system
KlinikSystem.stat4Label: Personal response time on support requests
KlinikSystem.objection1Q: We already have our own processes.
KlinikSystem.objection1A: Engpassradar replaces nothing — it reduces manual effort and adds score and alerting that are hard to replicate internally.
KlinikSystem.objection2A: For hospital pharmacies this amount is typically below the threshold that requires a formal procurement process. The onboarding call helps you formulate the internal business case.
KlinikSystem.objection3Q: What if the service goes down?
KlinikSystem.objection3A: SLA 99.9 % contractual. 30-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked. The official sources remain your primary source — we complement, we do not replace.
KlinikSystem.objection4Q: We are a small pharmacy, not a hospital.
KlinikSystem.objection4A: The Klinik-System makes sense for institutions monitoring around 100+ active substances. For smaller pharmacies we recommend Engpassradar Pro (CHF 39/mo) or the free access.
KlinikSystem.finalH2: See which shortages affect your institution today.
KlinikSystem.finalSubtitle: Send a request — we create a personalised Shortage Report free of charge and reply personally.
KlinikSystem.backRow: Developer or software vendor? API plans with rate limits and technical documentation.
